query: SELECT ar.id as request_id, a.titulo as acao_titulo, COUNT(ac.id) as num_comments FROM adjustment_requests ar LEFT JOIN actions a ON ar.actionId = a.id LEFT JOIN adjustment_comments ac ON ar.id = ac.adjustmentRequestId GROUP BY ar.id, a.titulo HAVING num_comments > 0 ORDER BY ar.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute SELECT ar.id as request_id, a.titulo as acao_titulo, COUNT(ac.id) as num_comments FROM adjustment_requests ar LEFT JOIN actions a ON ar.actionId = a.id LEFT JOIN adjustment_comments ac ON ar.id = ac.adjustmentRequestId GROUP BY ar.id, a.titulo HAVING num_comments > 0 ORDER BY ar.id;
